en_body:
morning comes
I
still love Life
hearing within early mist
the silken dawn
morning comes
leaves wave
tender hands
wind caresses green robes
bearing Autumn's footsteps
faraway
morning comes
waking from an ivory dream
who—
the one within dreaming
night
grew drunken with me
morning comes
loving
so much one Life
Love rings its fragrant song
tenderness
full and ebbing
